questions.question: When it truly matters, how do you show up?

options.label: When I commit, it is done. My word is my bond.
options.value: I follow through fully when I commit

options.label: I commit — but I need accountability to hold me to it.
options.value: I am committed but sometimes need accountability

options.label: I hesitate long before I act.
options.value: I hesitate a lot before taking action

options.label: Even when I care, I struggle to follow through.
options.value: I struggle to follow through even when I care

questions.question: Are you ready to bring Order to your life now?

options.label: I am ready to begin now.
options.value: I am ready to start now

options.label: I am close — but I need clarity on my path.
options.value: I think I am close, I just need clarity on the right path

options.label: I am still exploring my options.
options.value: I am exploring and trying to understand my options

options.label: I am not ready to change yet.
options.value: I am not ready to change this yet

options.label: I have heavily invested time and resources in myself
options.value: I have heavily invested time and resources in myself

options.label: I am willing to invest time and resources into myself
options.value: I am willing to invest time and resources into myself

options.label: I wouldn't invest time and/or money in myself
options.value: I wouldn't invest time and/or money in myself

options.label: I cannot invest time and/or money in myself right now
options.value: I cannot invest time and/or money in myself right now
